name: Holiday Chocolate Butter Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375 degrees.
2. In a large bowl, combine all ingredients except flour and cocoa powder.
- Beat at medium speed until light and fluffy (2-3 minutes).
3. Gradually add flour and cocoa powder until well mixed (2-3 minutes).
4. Shape rounded teaspoonfuls as desired:
- 1-inch balls
- 2"-3-inch logs
- flattened balls
- balls with indentations
5. Place the shaped cookies about 1 inch apart on ungreased cookie sheets.
6. Bake for 7-9 minutes or until set.
7. Allow to cool.
Decorate as desired using melted chocolate chips, melted almond bark, nuts, colored sugars, candied fruit, candies, maraschino cherries, etc.
